While the patient is on several medications, including Multivitamins, and has a history of hypertension, the presence of statins or explicit lipid panel abnormalities is absent in the current record. According to the refined criteria, the use of statins or general risk factors alone are insufficient to predict a future diagnosis of Disorders of Lipid Metabolism. Therefore, based strictly on the explicit evidence in the current record, the prediction is "No".
